title: Conventions in
emptyBody: Scan the repo to surface house-rules — naming, error handling, structure — each backed by evidence you can turn into a Skill.
noneFoundBody: The scan ran but no candidate survived evidence verification. Try re-scanning or add more indexed code.
noRepoBody: Pick a repository from the switcher to extract its conventions.
